title: IDF Capt. Shahar Gamla (24) & Sgt. Ohad Yaari (21) killed in Lebanon — Gamla by Hezbollah FPV drone, Yaari by accidental discharge; 30th & 31st IDF deaths since March
snippet: Capt. Shahar Gamla, 24, Natur (Golan Heights), Egoz commando unit — critically wounded by Hezbollah FPV drone attack overnight Thursday-Friday, died Saturday. Sgt. Ohad Yaari, 21, Rehovot, Givati Brigade Shaked Battalion — killed by accidental firearm discharge Friday. IDF death toll in Lebanon since March: 31. Fighting continues despite nominal truce.
tag_reason: New IDF casualties on June 6-7, distinct from Lemberg (June 5)
